title: Persist vpin_train_dist/rv_train_dist through validation -> POOLED.json so the GO bundle needs no out-of-band toxicity input
why: The section-4 toxicity-veto training distributions are a HARD input to the live toxicity veto (loader refuses empty arrays) but are computed transiently in run_osr_validation and not persisted; the bundle writer currently takes them as an explicit operator argument re-derived at freeze - the one manual, error-prone step left in the Jun-18 GO path.
scope: Add vpin_train_dist + rv_train_dist arrays to the run_osr_validation report (training-days-only artifacts, plumbing not strategy), pass through osr_pooled_selection frozen_artifacts, consume in write_osr_bundle_from_pooled (drop the toxicity_dists operator argument or keep as override-with-loud-warning). Optionally: thin GO-day driver CLI for write_osr_bundle_from_pooled if runbook prose is judged insufficient under Jun-18 pressure. Tests mirror existing pins. Consider risk-officer re-look at the full pooled GO path once closed (bundle seam changed since the B0168 PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT).

history.reason: chore(state): B0171 done, B0173 spawned (toxicity-dists persistence); iteration recorded
